---
title: "Economic Intelligence"
---

# 🌍 African Economic Intelligence

<div class="glass-card">

Daho Wealth tracks economic indicators that directly affect households, businesses, investors, and policymakers across Africa.

Our goal is to bridge data gaps across emerging and frontier economies through localized, accessible, and data-driven economic intelligence.

</div>

<div class="feature-grid">

<div class="metric-card">

## 🥖 Inflation & Food Prices

Track inflation trends, consumer prices, and retail marketplace fluctuations across African cities and regions.

</div>

<div class="metric-card">

## 💱 Exchange Rates

Monitor local currency movements, exchange-rate pressure, and hard-currency comparisons across African markets.

</div>

<div class="metric-card">

## 📊 GDP & Macroeconomics

Analyze GDP growth, purchasing power, commodity exposure, and regional economic performance indicators.

</div>

<div class="metric-card">

## ⛽ Commodity Intelligence

Track fuel prices, agricultural commodities, transportation costs, and energy-related market variables.

</div>

</div>

---

## Initial Coverage

<div class="glass-card">

The first datasets begin with Benin and West Africa, with future expansion planned across broader African markets.

Future dashboards will include:

- Inflation heatmaps
- Food price volatility
- Cost-of-living analysis
- Regional economic comparisons
- Consumer purchasing power indexes
- Commodity trend tracking
- Economic visualization dashboards

</div>
